content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the sync/import safety rules implementation. All 6 acceptance criteria are met: (1) sync --import-only support via BrCommand::sync_import() and BrMutationAdapter::sync_import() with dirty-flag and health guards, (2) sync_if_dirty() convenience method with clean/dirty branching, (3) JSONL health check in br_health.rs with BeadsHealthStatus enum covering Healthy/ConflictMarkers/MissingFile/MalformedJsonl/BrUnavailable/IoError, (4) pre-operation safety checks in milestone_record/service.rs deferred to just before mutation points (allowing read-only idempotent lookups to proceed), and non-blocking health warnings in success_reconciliation.rs for planned-elsewhere comment flows, (5) comprehensive doc comments on sync_flush, sync_import, BrMutationAdapter lifecycle invariants, and ensure_synced, (6) extensive unit tests for all new functionality. Quality gates pass: 942 tests OK, clippy clean with -D warnings, fmt clean. The claim_bead_in_br refactor correctly removes the short-circuit on recovered flush status (which could be spoofed by unrelated mutations from another operator) and always issues an explicit update. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
